name: Dictionary & Vocabulary Builder
description: Look up word definitions, pronunciation, etymology, and usage examples. Use this when a student asks what a word means, wants vocabulary help, or is building their vocabulary.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: lookup_word
tools.description: Look up a word's definition, pronunciation, part of speech, and usage examples. Use when the student asks what a word means or wants to learn vocabulary.

word.description: The English word to look up

tools.name: get_vocabulary_list
tools.description: Get all words the student has looked up in this session — their personal vocabulary list.
